data.title: Donald Trump calls Iranian proposal to end war 'totally unacceptable' | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: The Iranian proposal stressed the need to end the war on all fronts and to lift sanctions on Tehran, Iran's semi-official Tasnim news agency reported, citing an informed source.
data.keywords: Iran,Iran Deal,iran israel war,iran negotiations,Iran nuclear talks,us iran,us israel iran,Donald Trump,Operation Epic Fury,Operation Roaring Lion
